name: b00k.club
description: The website for the Public Works Book Club: we only read works in the public domain

scripts.build: pnpm initialize && zola build $BUILD_OPTS && npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./css/input.css -o ./public/style.css -m && npx pagefind --site public
scripts.build:cf: if [ "$CF_PAGES_BRANCH" = "main" ]; then pnpm build; else BUILD_OPTS="--base-url $CF_PAGES_URL" pnpm build; fi
scripts.serve: pnpm clean && zola build && npx pagefind --write-playground --site public && cp -r public/pagefind static/pagefind && zola serve --port 2665 $SERVE_OPTS & npx @tailwindcss/cli -i ./css/input.css -o ./public/style.css --watch && wait

author: Spencer Scorcelletti
